meaning: n.医院,医务室<美>养老院,救济院
examples: Sara hurries to leave the infirmary.
He occupied a little room in the infirmary.
He's getting out of the infirmary tonight.
Previously he had worked at Royal Aberdeen Infirmary in 2005 and Southampton Royal Hospital in 2006.
Stirling Royal Infirmary serves an estimated population of 130, 000 in the Stirling and Clackmannanshire area.
